reasoning: This animation sequence aims to represent the mysterious and somewhat enigmatic nature of the purple square emoji. The sequence will start with the arms at rest, transition to a pose suggesting curiosity or contemplation, then to a pose hinting at a hidden secret, and finally back to rest. The overall animation should portray a sense of intrigue and playful mystery. Frame 1: Both arms will be at rest. Frame 2: The robot will bring both hands up to its face, as if examining something closely or deep in thought. Frame 3: The robot will pull its hands back slightly, as if holding a secret close to its chest. Frame 4: Both arms will return to a neutral position.
